heading: Civilian faculty: number; compensation
label: 7438 Civilian faculty: number; compensation

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary of the Army may employ as many civilians as professors, instructors, and lecturers at the Academy as the Secretary considers necessary.

children.label: b
children.text: The compensation of persons employed under this section is as prescribed by the Secretary.
The work schedule, including hours of work and tours of duty, set forth with such specificity and other characteristics as the Secretary determines appropriate.
Any premium pay or compensatory time off for hours of work or tours of duty in excess of the regularly scheduled hours or tours of duty.
